title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 15 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Value movements were subdued this week, as achieved prices held broadly steady,with the exception of a slight correction in mid-age Supramax vessels. Kamsarmax Polynesia Queen (82,200 DWT, 2012, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold by Laus Ocean Shipping for USD 21 mil, VV Value USD 21.1 mil. Ultramax Livita (63,500 DWT, 2017, Shin Kasado Dock) sold by Ugland Bulk Shipping AS for USD 30.5 mil, VV Value USD 30.9 mil.
